{{Quote|Obs, that's ''Katanos VII'' ahead. Set your course for that mining colony down there.|[[Lunis]], to [[Obs Kaj]]|<ref name="RDV" />}}
'''Katanos VII''' was a [[Mining/Legends|mining]] colony located in the [[Xan sector/Legends|Xan sector]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. After its [[Cortosis/Legends|cortosis]] mines became depleted, its plight was ignored by the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]], so the colonists betrayed the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] to the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy]].

{{Planet-stub}}
